channel.title: wica — blog
channel.description: Notes on design, code, and slow living.

item.title: MDX Interactive Test
item.description: A demo of JSX components, LaTeX math, and Markdown living together.

item.title: Markdown & MDX Feature Test
item.description: A full exercise of every supported Markdown feature on the blog.

item.title: Embracing Slow Tech
item.description: On resisting the urge to optimize every second and building software that respects attention.

item.title: Designing Systems That Breathe
item.description: Thoughts on whitespace, rhythm, and intentional constraints in UI design.

item.title: The Quiet Joy of Small Tools
item.description: Why I prefer building tiny, focused utilities over large platforms.
